about.heading: About Me
about.summary: I design and ship enterprise Generative AI systems — from RAG pipelines and LLM applications to agentic automation. The focus is always the same: reliable systems that create measurable business value.

mission.heading: Current Mission
mission.title:
Building Enterprise GenAI
at Dun & Bradstreet
mission.description: Designing production AI systems that turn enterprise data into decisions — securely, reliably, and at scale.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subheading: Selected work shaping enterprise AI outcomes.

items.title: DocGen
items.description: A reusable GenAI platform that utilizes modular templates to automate the generation of structured, standardized, and high-quality technical documentation from model code.
points: Enhance Template-Driven Documentation Capabilities: Integration of predefined templates and dynamic content population.
Improve Documentation Accuracy & Coverage: Accurate mapping of code components to template sections.
Optimize Performance & Scalability: Faster document generation and enhanced backend orchestration.
Enable Reusability: Standardize template framework and build modular APIs.

items.title: Code Refactor
items.description: Robust AI-powered framework that automatically transforms monolithic notebooks into modular, reusable, and production-ready code.
points: Redevelop End-to-End Refactoring Framework: Notebook ingestion and automated workflow orchestration.
Improve Refactoring Accuracy & Reliability: Prompt optimization and reduction of functional errors.
Ensure Production Readiness: Containerized architecture and asynchronous processing.

items.title: Hoovers CRUSH Report Automation
items.description: Scalable AI-driven system that autonomously generates standardized company intelligence reports for Hoovers, enabling accurate updates for ~1,000 companies.
points: Enhance Data Ingestion & Processing Framework: Databricks-based processing.
Expand Data Enrichment & Intelligence Capabilities: Implement SEC 10-K path resolver.
Ensure Report Generation Accuracy: Validate data integrity and improve reliability.
Enable Scalable Weekly/Monthly Publishing: Seamless generation for approximately 1,000 companies.

items.title: Industrial Report Automation
items.description: AI-driven Industry Report Automation Platform that transforms manually created Hoovers reports into a scalable automated system.
points: Build End-to-End Report Automation Framework: Automate generation from multiple data sources.
Enhance Content Quality & Standardization: LLM-driven summarization with reusable templates.
Enable Scalable Data Integration: Automate extraction of key signals.
Ensure Production Readiness: Incremental updates and monitoring.
